---
title: Munich Cycling Counters
---

Munich's [Raddauerzählstellen](https://opendata.muenchen.de/dataset/daten-der-raddauerzaehlstellen-muenchen-2024)
are permanent automated counters that log cyclists at key roads across the city.
This demo ingests the open-data CSVs into two Delta Lake tables on S3 — one with
15-minute granularity, one with daily totals and weather observations — using the
[`@incremental`](../reference/incremental.incremental.qmd) and
[`@schema`](../reference/schema.schema.qmd) decorators.

**Data source:** Mobilitätsreferat LHM, 2022–present ·
License: [Datenlizenz Deutschland – Namensnennung 2.0](https://www.govdata.de/dl-de/by-2-0)

```{python}
#| echo: false
import os
from pathlib import Path

import altair as alt
import polars as pl

# Load .env for local rendering (ignored in CI where env vars come from secrets).
_env = Path("..") / ".env"
if _env.exists():
    for _line in _env.read_text().splitlines():
        if _line and not _line.startswith("#") and "=" in _line:
            _k, _, _v = _line.partition("=")
            os.environ.setdefault(_k.strip(), _v.strip())

BUCKET = os.environ.get("MUNICH_CYCLING_BUCKET", "data-warehousing-with-polars")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
daily = (
    pl.scan_delta(f"s3://{BUCKET}/delta/munich_cycling_daily")
    .select("datum", "zaehlstelle", "gesamt", "min_temp", "max_temp",
            "niederschlag", "sonnenstunden")
    .collect()
    .sort("datum")
)
daily.head(5)
```

## City-wide daily counts

Total cyclists counted across all stations each day (2022 – present).

```{python}
#| echo: false
totals = (
    daily.group_by("datum")
    .agg(pl.col("gesamt").sum().alias("total"))
    .sort("datum")
    .with_columns(
        pl.col("total").rolling_mean(window_size=28).alias("rolling_28d")
    )
)

base = alt.Chart(totals).encode(x=alt.X("datum:T", title="Date"))

raw = base.mark_line(opacity=0.25, color="#4C78A8").encode(
    y=alt.Y("total:Q", title="Cyclists per day")
)
smooth = base.mark_line(color="#4C78A8", strokeWidth=2).encode(
    y="rolling_28d:Q",
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip("datum:T", title="Date", format="%b %Y"),
        alt.Tooltip("rolling_28d:Q", title="28-day avg", format=",.0f"),
    ],
)

(raw + smooth).properties(width="container", height=260).configure_view(
    strokeWidth=0
)
```

## Seasonality — average counts by month

Average daily cyclists per month of year, broken out by year, showing the strong
summer peak and winter trough.

```{python}
#| echo: false
monthly = (
    daily.with_columns(
        pl.col("datum").dt.month().alias("month"),
        pl.col("datum").dt.year().cast(pl.Utf8).alias("year"),
    )
    .group_by("year", "month")
    .agg(pl.col("gesamt").mean().alias("avg_daily"))
    .sort("year", "month")
    .with_columns(
        pl.col("month").cast(pl.Utf8).str.zfill(2).alias("month_label")
    )
)

alt.Chart(monthly).mark_line(point=True).encode(
    x=alt.X("month:O", title="Month", axis=alt.Axis(labelExpr=(
        "['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec'][datum.value - 1]"
    ))),
    y=alt.Y("avg_daily:Q", title="Avg cyclists / day"),
    color=alt.Color("year:N", title="Year"),
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip("year:N", title="Year"),
        alt.Tooltip("month:O", title="Month"),
        alt.Tooltip("avg_daily:Q", title="Avg/day", format=",.0f"),
    ],
).properties(width="container", height=260).configure_view(strokeWidth=0)
```

## Temperature and cycling

Daily median temperature vs total cyclists counted (all stations, all days with
valid temperature readings). Each point is one day; warmer days consistently
attract more riders.

```{python}
#| echo: false
weather = (
    daily.filter(pl.col("max_temp").is_not_null())
    .group_by("datum")
    .agg(
        pl.col("gesamt").sum().alias("total"),
        pl.col("max_temp").mean().alias("max_temp"),
        pl.col("datum").dt.year().cast(pl.Utf8).first().alias("year"),
    )
)

alt.Chart(weather).mark_point(opacity=0.4, size=30).encode(
    x=alt.X("max_temp:Q", title="Max temperature (°C)"),
    y=alt.Y("total:Q", title="Cyclists per day"),
    color=alt.Color("year:N", title="Year"),
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip("datum:T", title="Date", format="%d %b %Y"),
        alt.Tooltip("max_temp:Q", title="Max temp (°C)", format=".1f"),
        alt.Tooltip("total:Q", title="Total cyclists", format=",.0f"),
    ],
).properties(width="container", height=260).configure_view(strokeWidth=0)
```

## Top stations by average daily volume

```{python}
#| echo: false
top_stations = (
    daily.group_by("zaehlstelle")
    .agg(pl.col("gesamt").mean().round(0).alias("avg_daily"))
    .sort("avg_daily", descending=True)
    .head(12)
)

alt.Chart(top_stations).mark_bar().encode(
    x=alt.X("avg_daily:Q", title="Avg cyclists / day"),
    y=alt.Y("zaehlstelle:N", sort="-x", title=None),
    color=alt.value("#4C78A8"),
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip("zaehlstelle:N", title="Station"),
        alt.Tooltip("avg_daily:Q", title="Avg/day", format=",.0f"),
    ],
).properties(width="container", height=320).configure_view(strokeWidth=0)
```
